page.content: Lastly, the "VD" row lists 560.18 for T, 90.82 for Blood, 124.39 for EPb, and — for VD. In Table 2, the headers include "Gene," "Number of loci," "Number of fisher exact comparisons performed between cluster 1 and 2," and "P-value (after Bonferroni correction)." The gene "Clk" has 4 loci, 8 comparisons, and a P-value of 0.123. "Cry1" has 4 loci, 8 comparisons, and a P-value of 0.125. "Per" has 4 loci, 8 comparisons, and a P-value of 0.122. The gene "Cyc" has 7 loci, 14 comparisons, and a P-value of 0.071. "Tim" has 4 loci, 8 comparisons, and a P-value of <0.0001*. "Cry2" has 8 loci, 16 comparisons, and a P-value of 0.063. "Pdp1" has 1 locus, 2 comparisons, and a P-value of 0.500. Finally, "Vri" has 2 loci, 4 comparisons, and a P-value of 0.333.
